Long afternoon winding down; heading home before evening to prepare dinner and settle in for the night.

beats.activity: Prepare dinner with foraged mushrooms, relax at home, review brewery notes
beats.reasoning: Evening wind-down: Cyrus cooks with his foraged chanterelles, tends to his brewing setup, and enjoys a quiet Sunday evening—low energy and contentment.

diary:
Started the day the way I like it—coffee and checking on my IPA. The batch is coming along nicely; I adjusted the temperature this morning and made some notes. Grabbed a second coffee at Fremont Coffee and walked back through the neighborhood, catching that perfect early light hitting the old brick buildings. There's something about Sunday mornings in Fremont that just settles me.

Headed out to Woodland Park around mid-morning to hunt for mushrooms. Found some good chanterelles near the south entrance, enough for dinner. Stopped by Solstice in Ballard for pizza—loved how quiet it was, just the warmth of the wood oven and a few other people. Then drove out to Discovery Park for an afternoon walk along the bluffs. That's where my eye as an architect really kicks in. The way the trails follow the contours, how the views open up... someone did good work there.

Ended the evening cooking with what I foraged, which felt right. Quiet, full.
thought_process: Today felt like a gift—no pressure, just a Sunday to move through at my own pace. I structured it around the things that genuinely center me: the brewery work that's become almost meditative, the foraging that keeps me connected to the city's wild edges, and the professional walks where I can appreciate landscape design without having to design anything myself. The weather cooperated perfectly, which made me more willing to linger at each stop rather than rushing through. I didn't feel the need to be productive in any conventional sense; instead I was productive about joy. My mood stayed even and content throughout—no anxiety, no restlessness. By evening, cooking with foraged mushrooms felt like the natural completion of a day that had been about noticing and gathering.
world_event_prompt: Calm, sunny Sunday, high of 72F. Quiet end-of-week day with no major disruptions. Lake Union sees heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic in the afternoon.
